<script>
(function(){
  var map={
    '/projects':'https://www.designmonks.co/projects',
    '/blog':'https://www.designmonks.co/blog',
    '/case-study':'https://www.designmonks.co/case-study',
    '/services':'https://www.designmonks.co/services',
    '/career':'https://www.designmonks.co/career',
    '/industry':'https://www.designmonks.co/industry',
    '/products':'https://www.designmonks.co/products'
  };
  var path=window.location.pathname.replace(/\/$/,'');
  var page=Number((window.location.search.match(/[?&]page=(\d+)/)||[])[1]);
  if(page&&page>1&&map[path]){
    document.querySelectorAll('link[rel="canonical"]').forEach(function(l){l.parentNode.removeChild(l);});
    var c=document.createElement('link');
    c.rel='canonical';
    c.href=map[path];
    document.head.appendChild(c);
  }
})();
</script>
<!-- Block PT Sans — Intercepts WebFont Loader    -->
<!-- Defines fake WebFont.load before fs-cc runs  -->
<!-- ============================================= -->
<script>
  (function () {
    // Define a fake WebFont object before fs-cc.js loads
    // When fs-cc calls WebFont.load({ google: { families: ['PT Sans'] }})
    // we catch it and strip PT Sans out entirely
    window.WebFont = {
      load: function (config) {
        if (config && config.google && config.google.families) {
          // Remove PT Sans from requested families
          config.google.families = config.google.families.filter(function (f) {
            return !f.toLowerCase().includes('pt sans');
          });
          // If nothing left to load — stop entirely
          if (config.google.families.length === 0) return;
        }
        // If other fonts remain — load real WebFont and proceed
        var script = document.createElement('script');
        script.src = 'https://ajax.googleapis.com/ajax/libs/webfont/1.6.26/webfont.js';
        script.onload = function () {
          if (window.WebFontReal) {
            window.WebFontReal.load(config);
          }
        };
        document.head.appendChild(script);
      }
    };
  })();
</script>

<style>
  /* Splide visible after initialized */
  .splide.is-initialized {
    visibility: visible !important;
  }

    font-weight: 400;

  /* Lenis CSS inlined */
  html.lenis,
  html.lenis body { height: auto; }
  .lenis.lenis-smooth { scroll-behavior: auto !important; }
  .lenis.lenis-smooth [data-lenis-prevent] { overscroll-behavior: contain; }
  .lenis.lenis-stopped { overflow: hidden; }
  .lenis.lenis-smooth iframe { pointer-events: none; }

  @property --_gradient-angle {
    syntax: '<angle>';
    inherits: false;
    initial-value: 0deg;
  }
  @keyframes gradient-angle-rotate {
    0% { --_gradient-angle: 0deg; }
    100% { --_gradient-angle: 360deg; }
  }

  /* Scrollbar styling */
  ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 10px; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: darkgray; border-radius: 5px; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: gray; }

  /* Hide scrollbar for inner elements */
  .inner-scroll-element {
    scrollbar-width: none;
    -ms-overflow-style: none;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  }
  .inner-scroll-element::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }

  [hide-scroll='true'] {
    scrollbar-width: none;
    -ms-overflow-style: none;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  }
  [hide-scroll='true']::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }

@media (max-width: 991px) {

</style>

/* Make text look crisper and more legible in all browsers */
body {
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
  font-smoothing: antialiased;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}

/* Focus state style for keyboard navigation for the focusable elements */
*[tabindex]:focus-visible,
  input[type="file"]:focus-visible {
   outline: 0.125rem solid #4d65ff;
   outline-offset: 0.125rem;
}

/* Set color style to inherit */
.inherit-color * {
    color: inherit;
}

/* Get rid of top margin on first element in any rich text element */
.w-richtext > :not(div):first-child, .w-richtext > div:first-child > :first-child {
  margin-top: 0 !important;
}

/* Get rid of bottom margin on last element in any rich text element */
.w-richtext>:last-child, .w-richtext ol li:last-child, .w-richtext ul li:last-child {
	margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}


/* Make sure containers never lose their center alignment */
.container-medium,.container-small, .container-large {
	margin-right: auto !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
}

/* 
Make the following elements inherit typography styles from the parent and not have hardcoded values. 
Important: You will not be able to style for example "All Links" in Designer with this CSS applied.
Uncomment this CSS to use it in the project. Leave this message for future hand-off.
*/
/*
a,
.w-input,
.w-select,
.w-tab-link,
.w-nav-link,
.w-dropdown-btn,
.w-dropdown-toggle,
.w-dropdown-link {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: inherit;
  font-size: inherit;
}
*/

/* Apply "..." after 3 lines of text */
.text-style-3lines {
	display: -webkit-box;
	overflow: hidden;
	-webkit-line-clamp: 3;
	-webkit-box-orient: vertical;
}

/* Apply "..." after 2 lines of text */
.text-style-2lines {
	display: -webkit-box;
	overflow: hidden;
	-webkit-line-clamp: 2;
	-webkit-box-orient: vertical;
}

/* Apply "..." after 1 lines of text */
.text-style-1lines {
	display: -webkit-box;
	overflow: hidden;
	-webkit-line-clamp: 1;
	-webkit-box-orient: vertical;
}

/* These classes are never overwritten */
.hide {
  display: none !important;
}

@media screen and (max-width: 991px) {

/* New Navbar Design */
.rd-navbar {
  --_action-btn-size: 64px;
  --_curve-round-gap: 6px;
  --_curve-round-radius: 16px;
  --_middle-size: calc(var(--_action-btn-size) + var(--_curve-round-radius) + (var(--_curve-round-gap) * 2));
  --_link-column-size: calc((100vw - var(--_middle-size)) / 4);
  --_top-offset: 80px;
  --_left-offset: calc(50% - (var(--_middle-size) / 2));
  --_right-offset: calc(50% + (var(--_middle-size) / 2));
  --_cutfix: 10px;
  --_left-offset-cutfix: calc(var(--_left-offset) - var(--_cutfix));
  --_right-offset-cutfix: calc(var(--_right-offset) + var(--_cutfix));
}

.rd-navbar_wrapper {
  --_shadow-rgb: 48, 255, 151;
}

.rd-navbar {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr auto 1fr 1fr;
}

.rd-navbar_wrapper[data-wf--new-navbar--variant="secondary"] .rd-navbar_curve-shape {
  display: none;
}

.rd-navbar_btn {
  clip-path: inset(0 round var(--color--navbar--btn-border-radius));
}

.rd-navbar_btn_content {
  clip-path: inset(var(--color--navbar--btn-border-width) round calc(var(--color--navbar--btn-border-radius) - var(--color--navbar--btn-border-width)));
}

.rd-navbar_btn_bg {
  background: conic-gradient(from var(--_gradient-angle) at 8.04% 51.79%, #FBFAF6 0deg, rgba(251, 250, 246, 0.00) 360deg), var(--color--solid--primary--500);
  animation: gradient-angle-rotate 3s linear infinite;
}

.rd-navbar_dropdown_list:not(.w--open) {
  opacity: 0;
  visibility: hidden;
}

.rd-navbar_block_card:is(:hover, :focus-visible) .rd-navbar_block_card_image {
  transform: scale(1.2);
}

[data-wf--navbar-dropdown-block--variant="regular"] .rd-navbar_dropdown_block_shape {
  left: 14rem;
}

[data-wf--navbar-dropdown-block--variant="reversed"] .rd-navbar_dropdown_block_shape {
  right: 6.625rem;
}

.rd-navbar_dropdown_block {
  box-shadow: 0px 4px 16px -2px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
}

.rd-navbar_link.w--open {
  color: #A87FFF;
}

.rd-navbar_overlay {
  opacity: 0;
  visibility: hidden;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.rd-navbar_wrapper:has(.w-dropdown-toggle[aria-expanded="true"]) .rd-navbar_overlay,
.rd-navbar_overlay.show {
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  pointer-events: all;
}

.rd-navbar_block_link {
  -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
}

.rd-navbar_block_link:not(:hover, :focus-visible) .rd-navbar_block_link_icon {
  opacity: 0;
}

.rd-navbar_block_link:is(:hover, :focus-visible) {
  background-color: rgba(15, 115, 248, 0.15);
  box-shadow: 0 1px 0 var(--color--solid--primary--500);
}

.rd-navbar_block_card:is(:hover, :focus-visible) .rd-navbar_block_card_header_arrow {
  color: var(--color--solid--primary--500);
}

@media screen and (max-width: 767px) {
  .rd-navbar_wrapper[data-wf--new-navbar--variant="primary"] .rd-navbar {
    padding: 16px 0 22px;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr var(--_middle-size) 1fr 1fr;
  }

  .rd-navbar_wrapper[data-wf--new-navbar--variant="secondary"] .rd-navbar {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
  }

  .rd-navbar_wrapper[data-wf--new-navbar--variant="primary"] .rd-navbar_btn {
    justify-self: center;
  }

  .rd-navbar_wrapper[data-wf--new-navbar--variant="secondary"] .rd-navbar_btn {
    grid-column: 1/-1;
    order: -1;
    margin: 7px 20px 20px;
  }

  .rd-navbar_wrapper[data-wf--new-navbar--variant="primary"] .rd-navbar_btn::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    box-shadow: inset 0 3px 4px #30ff9766;
    pointer-events: none;
    border-radius: var(--color--navbar--btn-border-radius);
  }

  .rd-navbar_wrapper[data-wf--new-navbar--variant="primary"] .rd-navbar_btn_icon {
    font-size: 2rem;
  }

  .rd-navbar_wrapper[data-wf--new-navbar--variant="primary"] .rd-navbar_btn_text {
    display: none;
  }

  .rd-navbar_wrapper {
    padding-bottom: 0;
  }

  .rd-navbar_bg {
    border-bottom-left-radius: 0;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 0;
  }

  .rd-navbar_wrapper[data-wf--new-navbar--variant="primary"] .rd-navbar_bg {
    clip-path: polygon(0 0, var(--_left-offset) 0, var(--_left-offset) var(--_top-offset), var(--_right-offset) var(--_top-offset), var(--_right-offset) 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
  }

  .rd-navbar_curve-shape {
    clip-path: polygon(var(--_left-offset-cutfix) 0, var(--_right-offset-cutfix) 0, var(--_right-offset-cutfix) 100%, var(--_left-offset-cutfix) 100%);
  }

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/intl-tel-input@28.1.0/dist/css/intlTelInput.css">

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/intl-tel-input@28.1.0/dist/js/intlTelInput.min.js"></script>
<script>
let geoCountryCache = null;

function getGeoCountry() {
  return new Promise((resolve) => {
    if (geoCountryCache) return resolve(geoCountryCache);
    fetch("https://ipapi.co/json")
      .then((res) => res.json())
      .then((data) => { geoCountryCache = data.country_code; resolve(geoCountryCache); })
      .catch(() => resolve("us"));
  });
}

getGeoCountry();

const utilsPromise = import("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/intl-tel-input@28.1.0/dist/js/utils.js");

function initPhoneWidget(widget) {
  if (widget.dataset.phoneInit) return;
  widget.dataset.phoneInit = "true";

  const input = widget.querySelector("[data-phone-number]");
  const hiddenInput = widget.querySelector("[data-phone-combined]");
  if (!input || !hiddenInput) return;

  const iti = window.intlTelInput(input, {
    loadUtils: () => utilsPromise,
    initialCountry: "auto",
    geoIpLookup: (callback) => {
      getGeoCountry().then(callback);
    }
  });

  // Rename search input and populate it with selected country code
  const searchInput = widget.querySelector("input[type='search']");

  const updateCountryCode = () => {
    if (searchInput) {
      const countryData = iti.getSelectedCountryData();
      searchInput.name = "Country Code";
      searchInput.value = countryData.dialCode ? "+" + countryData.dialCode : "";
    }
  };

  const updatePhone = () => {
    hiddenInput.value = iti.getNumber();
    updateCountryCode();
  };

  input.addEventListener("input", updatePhone);
  input.addEventListener("countrychange", updatePhone);

  // Set initial country code after geo-IP resolves
  setTimeout(updateCountryCode, 500);

  const form = input.closest("form");
  if (form && !form.dataset.phoneReady) {
    form.dataset.phoneReady = "true";
    form.addEventListener("submit", updatePhone);
  }
}

function scanAndInit() {
  document.querySelectorAll("[data-phone-widget]").forEach(initPhoneWidget);
}

const observer = new MutationObserver(scanAndInit);

window.addEventListener("load", function () {
  scanAndInit();
  observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
});
</script>

<script defer="">
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    // ── Navbar aria-expanded observer ──
    const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
      mutations.forEach((mutation) => {
        let isOpen = mutation.target.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';
        document.querySelector('.rd-navbar_overlay')?.classList.toggle('show', isOpen);
      });
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('.rd-navbar_link.w-dropdown-toggle').forEach((item) => {
      observer.observe(item, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['aria-expanded'] });
    });

    // ── Cache DOM elements once ──
    const triggerElement = document.querySelector("[data-trigger='navbar-gradient']");
    const btnBg = document.querySelector('.rd-navbar_btn_content_bg');
    const backTopBtn = document.querySelector('.back-top');

    // ── Lenis smooth scroll ──
    const lenis = new Lenis({ lerp: 0.1 });

    // ── RAF loop to drive Lenis ──
    function raf(time) {
      lenis.raf(time);
      requestAnimationFrame(raf);
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(raf);

    // ── Navbar gradient (only on pages that have the trigger element) ──
    if (btnBg) {
      if (triggerElement) {
        btnBg.style.opacity = '0';
        lenis.on('scroll', function ({ scroll }) {
          btnBg.style.opacity = scroll > triggerElement.offsetTop ? '1' : '0';
        });
      }
      // No trigger = CSS default opacity:1 stays untouched ✅
    }

    // ── Back to top scroll visibility ──
    lenis.on('scroll', function ({ scroll }) {
      if (backTopBtn) {
        const documentHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight;
        const isPastHalf = scroll > documentHeight / 2;
        backTopBtn.style.opacity = isPastHalf ? '1' : '0';
        backTopBtn.style.pointerEvents = isPastHalf ? 'all' : 'none';
      }
    });

    // ── Back to top click ──
    if (backTopBtn) {
      backTopBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
        lenis.scrollTo(0);
      });
    }

    // ── Marquee Splide sliders ──
    document.querySelectorAll('.common-marquee-slider').forEach((item) => {
      const autoScrollSpeed = item.dataset.speed ? parseFloat(item.dataset.speed) : 0.5;
      const isDraggable = item.dataset.drag !== 'false';

      let splideInstance = new Splide(item, {
        pagination: false,
        arrows: false,
        autoWidth: true,
        type: 'loop',
        drag: isDraggable,
        autoScroll: {
          speed: item.dataset.direction === 'reversed' ? -autoScrollSpeed : autoScrollSpeed,
          pauseOnHover: false,
          pauseOnFocus: false,
        },
      });

      splideInstance.mount(window.splide.Extensions);

      // Debounced ix2 refresh
      let ix2Timer;
      splideInstance.on('moved', () => {
        clearTimeout(ix2Timer);
        ix2Timer = setTimeout(() => Webflow.require('ix2').init(), 300);
      });
      setTimeout(() => Webflow.require('ix2').init(), 500);
    });

    // ── Honeypot spam protection ──
    document.querySelectorAll('form').forEach((form) => {
      let honeypot = form.querySelector("[name='work-email']");
      let submit = form.querySelector("[type='submit']");
      if (honeypot && submit) {
        honeypot.addEventListener('input', function () {
          submit.disabled = honeypot.value.length > 0;
        });
      }
    });

    // ── Promo video hover/click audio control ──
    const videos = document.querySelectorAll('[dm-promo]');
    const isDesktop = window.matchMedia('(hover: hover) and (pointer: fine)').matches;

    videos.forEach(function (video) {
      video.removeAttribute('controls');
      video.muted = true;
      video.autoplay = true;
      video.loop = true;
      video.playsInline = true;
      video.play().catch(() => {});

      // Always muted — skip all audio controls
      if (video.hasAttribute('dm-always-muted')) return;

      function muteAllExcept(currentVideo) {
        videos.forEach(function (otherVideo) {
          if (otherVideo !== currentVideo) otherVideo.muted = true;
        });
      }

      video.addEventListener('click', function () {
        if (video.muted) {
          muteAllExcept(video);
          video.muted = false;
        } else {
          video.muted = true;
        }
      });

      if (isDesktop && !video.hasAttribute('dm-click-only')) {
        video.addEventListener('mouseenter', function () {
          muteAllExcept(video);
          video.muted = false;
        });
        video.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () {
          video.muted = true;
        });
      }
    });
  }); // ← closes DOMContentLoaded ✅
</script>



<script>
  const trigger = document.querySelector('[data-megamenu-trigger="product"]');
  const block = document.querySelector('[data-megamenu-block="product"]');
  const rowBg = document.querySelector('[data-megamenu-row-bg="product"]');
  const items = document.querySelectorAll('[data-megamenu-item="product"]');
  const blockBg = document.querySelector('[data-megamenu-block-bg="product"]');

  const ROW_HEIGHT = 'auto'; // ← set to your actual open height in px

  let tl = null;
  let isOpen = false;
  let closeTimer = null;
  let scrollKiller = null;

  // ── TIMELINE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  function buildTimeline() {
    if (tl) tl.kill();

    gsap.set(block, { display: 'block', opacity: 1 });
    gsap.set(rowBg, { height: 0 });
    gsap.set(items, { opacity: 0, x: -20 });

    tl = gsap.timeline({ paused: true });

    tl.to(rowBg, {
      height: ROW_HEIGHT,
      duration: 0.35,
      ease: 'expo.out',
    });

    tl.to(
      items,
      {
        opacity: 1,
        x: 0,
        duration: 0.3,
        ease: 'power3.out',
        stagger: 0.045,
      },
      '<0.1',
    );
  }

  // ── OPEN ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  function openMenu() {
    cancelClose();
    if (isOpen) return;
    isOpen = true;

    buildTimeline();
    tl.play();
    attachScrollKiller();
  }

  // ── CLOSE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  function scheduleClose() {
    cancelClose();
    closeTimer = setTimeout(closeMenu, 80);
  }

  function cancelClose() {
    if (closeTimer) {
      clearTimeout(closeTimer);
      closeTimer = null;
    }
  }

  function closeMenu() {
    cancelClose();
    if (!isOpen) return;
    isOpen = false;

    if (tl) {
      tl.reverse().then(() => {
        gsap.set(block, { display: 'none' });
      });
    }

    detachScrollKiller();
  }

  // ── SCROLL KILL ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  function attachScrollKiller() {
    detachScrollKiller();
    scrollKiller = () => {
      if (isOpen) closeMenu();
    };
    window.addEventListener('scroll', scrollKiller, { passive: true });
  }

  function detachScrollKiller() {
    if (scrollKiller) {
      window.removeEventListener('scroll', scrollKiller);
      scrollKiller = null;
    }
  }

  // ── EVENTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  trigger.addEventListener('mouseenter', openMenu);
  trigger.addEventListener('mouseleave', scheduleClose);

  block.addEventListener('mouseenter', cancelClose);
  block.addEventListener('mouseleave', scheduleClose);

  blockBg.addEventListener('mouseenter', closeMenu);

  // ── INIT ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  gsap.set(block, { display: 'none' });
</script>

<script>
  var CHATWOOT_BASE_URL = 'https://chatwoot-production-47a9.up.railway.app';
  window.chatwootSettings = {
    position: 'right',
    type: 'standard',
    launcherTitle: '',
    availableMessage: "👋 Welcome! You've just found your design partner."
  };
  window.dmWidget = {

    hideWelcomeAvatars: true,

    launcherDot: { color: '#22c55e', borderColor: '#fff', position: 'top-right' },
    mobileLauncher: { selector: '#contact-wi' },
  };

  // Forward dmWidget into the iframe once it signals readiness.
  window.addEventListener('message', function (e) {
    if (e.origin !== CHATWOOT_BASE_URL) return;
    if (e.data && e.data.type === 'dm-widget:ready' && e.source) {
      e.source.postMessage({ type: 'dm-widget:config', payload: window.dmWidget || {} }, e.origin);
    }
  });

  // Parent-side handlers — mirror of the HANDLERS registry in
  // widget_overrides.js, for keys this page applies itself (the launcher bubble
  // and SDK live here, not in the iframe). See docs/BRANDING.md.
  var DOT_POSITIONS = {
    'top-left': { left: '14.6%', top: '14.6%' },
    'top-right': { left: '85.4%', top: '14.6%' },
    'bottom-left': { left: '14.6%', top: '85.4%' },
    'bottom-right': { left: '85.4%', top: '85.4%' },
  };

  var HOST_HANDLERS = {
    // Swap the bubble icon for a logo. Appended as an <img> child because a CSS
    // background loses specificity to Chatwoot's own bubble styles.
    launcherIcon: function (url) {
      document.head.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', '<style>#woot-widget-bubble-icon,.woot--close img{display:none}</style>');
      new MutationObserver(function () {
        document.querySelectorAll('.woot-widget-bubble').forEach(function (bubble) {
          if (bubble.dataset.dmLogo === '1') return;
          bubble.dataset.dmLogo = '1';
          var img = document.createElement('img');
          img.src = url;
          img.width = 32;
          img.alt = '';
          bubble.appendChild(img);
        });
      }).observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
    },

    // "Online" status dot, centered on the bubble edge (half in / half out).
    // Percentage offsets straddle the edge at any bubble size. overflow needs
    // !important: Chatwoot's stylesheet loads after this and sets it hidden at
    // equal specificity. Skipped on the close-X bubble.
    launcherDot: function (opts) {
      var pos = DOT_POSITIONS[opts.position] || DOT_POSITIONS['bottom-right'];
      document.head.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', '<style>' + '.woot-widget-bubble{overflow:visible!important}' + '.woot-widget-bubble:not(.woot--close)::after{' + 'content:"";position:absolute;left:' + pos.left + ';top:' + pos.top + ';' + 'transform:translate(-50%,-50%);' + 'width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;' + 'background:' + (opts.color || '#22c55e') + ';' + 'border:2px solid ' + (opts.borderColor || '#fff') + ';' + 'pointer-events:none;' + '}' + '</style>');
    },

    mobileLauncher: function (opts) {
      document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
          if (!e.target.closest || !e.target.closest(opts.selector)) return;
          var bubble = document.querySelector('.woot-widget-bubble:not(.woot--close)');
          // Only hijack the click when the default bubble is hidden (mobile, per the Head CSS)
          if (!bubble || getComputedStyle(bubble).display !== 'none') return;
          e.preventDefault();
          if (window.$chatwoot) window.$chatwoot.toggle('open');
        });
    },
  };

  function applyHostConfig() {
    var cfg = window.dmWidget || {};
    for (var k in cfg) if (HOST_HANDLERS[k]) HOST_HANDLERS[k](cfg[k]);
  }
  applyHostConfig();

  (function (d, t) {

        baseUrl: CHATWOOT_BASE_URL,
      });
    };
  })(document, 'script');

<script defer="" src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@11/swiper-bundle.min.js"></script>

<script defer="">
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    // Initialize Swiper with 'cards' effect
    const swiperElement = document.querySelector(".testimonial");
    if (swiperElement) {
      const swiper = new Swiper(".testimonial", {
        effect: "cards",
        grabCursor: true,
        loop: true,
        pagination: {
          el: ".swiper-pagination", // Pagination container
          clickable: true, // Allows user to click on dots
        },
      });

      // Add event listeners to custom buttons if they exist
      const nextButton = document.querySelector(".next-slide");
      const prevButton = document.querySelector(".back-slide");

      if (nextButton) {
        nextButton.addEventListener("click", () => swiper.slideNext());
      }
      if (prevButton) {
        prevButton.addEventListener("click", () => swiper.slidePrev());
      }
    }

    // Disable links without valid href
    document.querySelectorAll(".category-link").forEach((link) => {
      if (!link.getAttribute("href") || link.getAttribute("href") === "#") {
        link.style.pointerEvents = "none"; // Disables clicking
        link.style.cursor = "default"; // Changes cursor to default
      }
    });
  });
</script>
